title: Paper High Recycled Metal 'Love' Sign | 20cm x 8.5cm | Fair Trade and Handmade | Metal Fireplace Ornament Gift New Home Decor
features: Spread a little love in your home with our eye-catching metal sign. The perfect ornament for your abode, or perhaps the planet-friendly present you've been looking for.
Using traditional skills passed down from one generation to the next, our range of handmade, inspirational metal signs make the perfect finishing touch for your home.
Crafted from 50% recycled aluminium, the polished silver finish makes the decoration an eye-catching reminder of cherished values for you and your loved ones.
An ideal gift for your loved ones, our handmade recycled metal 'LOVE' sign is perfect to celebrate a wedding, new home, birthday or special occasion.
Our sign was made by Noah's Ark, a member of both the World Fair Trade Organisation and Fair Trade Forum India whose goal is to change the lives of grassroots artisans.
description: Product Description Spread a little love in your home with this eye-catching metal sign. The perfect decorative ornament for your abode, or perhaps the planet-friendly present you’ve been looking for for a loved one’s wedding, birthday, or new home celebration. Using traditional skills passed down from one generation to the next, our range of handmade, inspirational metal signs make the perfect finishing touch for your home. Crafted from 50% recycled aluminium, the polished silver finish makes the decoration an eye-catching reminder of cherished values for you and your loved ones. Due to the handmade nature of these products each one is unique, but loveliness comes as standard. Meet the maker This product has been made by Noah’s Ark, a fantastic member of both the World Fair Trade Organisation (WFTO) and Fair Trade Forum India. With their mission to commit themselves and the producer groups they work with to Fair Trade principles, their goal is to change the lives of grassroots artisans. The organisation works with around 49 talented producer groups, representing approximately 500 artisans collectively working towards the eradication of poverty. Their focus on education and capacity building enables the people they support to become more aware of fair working conditions and the environment, in order to promote the value, cultural heritage and beauty of their handmade products. By making a purchase, you are helping to continue the fantastic work of our producers.
